items.title: IBM BOARD APPROVES REGULAR QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
items.author: Prnewswire
items.description: IBM's board of directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $1.67 per common share, payable on March 10, 2025 to stockholders of record on February 10, 2025. This marks the company's consecutive quarterly dividend payments since 1916.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article reports that IBM's board has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend, which is a positive sign for the company's financial stability and commitment to returning value to shareholders.

items.title: Should You Buy IBM Stock Before Jan. 29?
items.author: Timothy Green
items.description: IBM is set to report Q4 earnings on January 29. The stock has surged 65% in the past 3 years as the company focuses on hybrid-cloud and AI platforms. While the stock could see short-term volatility based on the earnings report, IBM is a buy for long-term investors due to its enterprise customer base and positioning in generative AI.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article suggests that IBM is a buy for long-term investors due to its enterprise customer base, focus on hybrid-cloud and AI platforms, and potential for growth in the coming years.
